articles.title: Lower Macungie planning commission approves industrial rezoning on 240 acres
articles.summary: A former farm parcel near Route 100 was rezoned from agricultural to industrial, clearing the way for a 1.2M SF distribution center.

articles.title: Jersey Mike's signs lease for 1,800 SF in Allentown shopping center
articles.summary: The sandwich chain has signed a lease at the Tilghman Square Shopping Center, its third Lehigh Valley location.

articles.title: Chester County industrial park lands FedEx as anchor tenant
articles.summary: FedEx Ground signed a 15-year lease for a 425,000 SF distribution facility in Coatesville.

articles.title: Allentown's NIZ approves $42M mixed-use project on Hamilton Street
articles.summary: The Neighborhood Improvement Zone authority approved financing for a seven-story mixed-use building combining ground-floor retail with apartments above.

articles.title: Bucks County rejects rezoning for proposed Doylestown retail center
articles.summary: Township supervisors voted 4-1 against a developer's request to rezone a 12-acre parcel from residential to commercial.

articles.title: Berks County medical office building trades for $14.2M
articles.summary: The 65,000 SF Class A medical office building in Wyomissing sold to a Philadelphia-based private equity buyer.

articles.title: Lancaster County warehouse expansion adds 180,000 SF
articles.summary: A logistics tenant is doubling the size of its Manheim Township distribution facility, with completion targeted for Q4 2026.

articles.title: Aldi opening fourth Lehigh Valley store in former Bon-Ton space
articles.summary: The grocery discounter will occupy 22,000 SF at the former Bon-Ton anchor space in a Whitehall shopping center.

articles.title: Wawa plans three new stores across Northampton County
articles.summary: The convenience chain confirmed three Northampton County locations with groundbreakings scheduled for late summer.

articles.title: Sheetz buying former Friendly's site in Whitehall for new prototype store
articles.summary: The convenience store operator acquired the 2.4-acre Whitehall Township site and plans to demolish the existing restaurant.

articles.title: Bethlehem zoning hearing scheduled for proposed South Side hotel project
articles.summary: A developer is seeking variances for a 142-room boutique hotel on Bethlehem's South Side, with the zoning hearing set for next month.

articles.title: Dollar General opens 14th Berks County location this year
articles.summary: The discount retailer continues aggressive expansion across Berks County with a new 9,100 SF store in Bernville.

articles.title: Reading developer breaks ground on $28M apartment complex
articles.summary: Construction has begun on a 184-unit multifamily project near downtown Reading.

articles.title: Philadelphia office vacancy hits 21% as CBD softens further
articles.summary: Center City office vacancy climbed again in Q1 2026 as several large tenants downsized or sublet space.

articles.title: Easton Planning Commission tables decision on College Hill subdivision
articles.summary: Commissioners requested additional traffic studies before voting on a proposed 38-lot residential subdivision.
